purpose: Define Phase 11 promotion gates and stop conditions before P11.2 readiness audit.
p11_3_unlock_rule: P11.3 may start only after all hard gates pass and soft-gate deferrals are recorded as non-blocking.
stop_report_rule: If any hard gate is blocked, P11.2 must write a stop report and keep P11.3 model-input generation blocked.
non_goals: no promotion of figure-derived values without accepted model-contract status
no overwrite of accepted Phase 5 baseline paths
next_step: P11.2 build promotion-readiness audit generator and emit readiness manifest
